how.title: How It Works
how.subtitle: Generate stunning AI images in 3 simple steps. No technical knowledge required.
how.step_1_desc: Describe the image you want to create. Be specific about style, colors, and composition.
how.step_2_desc: Choose a size preset, quality level, and export format for the kind of image you want to make.
how.step_3_desc: Click generate and let GPT Image 2 Generator turn your prompt into a finished image in seconds.
how.step_4_desc: Download your AI-generated image in high resolution PNG or JPG format.

faq.title: GPT Image 2 Generator FAQ
faq.subtitle: Quick answers before you start generating
faq.q1: Is GPT Image 2 free to use?
faq.a1: Yes. New users get free trial generations so you can test GPT Image 2 prompts, sizes, and export formats before paying for more credits.
faq.q2: How is it different from standard ChatGPT image generation?
faq.a2: This GPT Image 2 workspace gives you a dedicated prompt-to-image flow with visible size, quality, and format controls, so it feels faster and easier to evaluate than a general chat interface.
faq.q3: How do I use GPT Image 2 Generator?
faq.a3: Write a clear prompt, choose your size, quality, and export format, then click generate. The result appears in the preview area and can be downloaded immediately.
faq.q4: What prompts work best in GPT Image 2 Generator?
faq.a4: Prompts with a clear subject, scene, lighting, composition, and style direction usually perform best. Product ads, portraits, posters, and UI boards all benefit from concrete layout language.

seo.comparison_title: GPT Image 2 Generator vs Other AI Image Tools
seo.comparison_intro: When comparing AI image generators, GPT Image 2 Generator stands out with a simple workflow, strong prompt readability, and polished outputs:
seo.compare_chinese_desc: Use natural descriptions with style, subject, lighting, and composition details in one clean workflow.
seo.compare_speed_desc: Generate quickly, refine your prompt, and iterate without leaving the page.
seo.compare_price_desc: Start with free generations and scale up only when you need more creative volume.
seo.compare_queue_desc: No chat-command syntax, no complex setup. Just prompt and generate.
seo.video_title: How to Use GPT Image 2 Generator for Image-to-Video Workflows
seo.video_intro: The upcoming Image-to-Video feature will transform your static AI images into dynamic video content. Here's what to expect:
seo.video_step_1_desc: Start by generating a detailed keyframe image with GPT Image 2 Generator.
seo.video_step_2_desc: Choose from animated, cinematic, or subtle motion presets to define the video style.
seo.video_step_3_desc: Select video length from 3 to 10 seconds. Longer videos require more credits.
seo.video_step_4_desc: Click generate and download your video in MP4 format, ready for social media.
seo.tech_intro: GPT Image 2 Generator is built for modern text-to-image creation with strong prompt readability and fast visual iteration:
seo.tech_feature_1_desc: Complex prompts with multiple objects, lighting cues, and style references are handled in one generation workflow.
seo.tech_feature_2_desc: You can write prompts naturally instead of learning rigid syntax.
seo.tech_feature_3_desc: Switch between photorealistic, digital art, anime, and cinematic outputs with one click.
seo.tech_feature_4_desc: Refine prompts and generate new versions quickly for a smoother creative loop.
